name: vscode-nuget-switcher
description: Switch between NuGet PackageReferences and ProjectReferences in .NET projects

commands.title: NuGet Switcher: Switch to Project References
NuGet Switcher: Switch to Package References

nugetSwitcher.additionalSearchPaths.description: Additional directories to search for .csproj files outside the workspace.
nugetSwitcher.additionalSearchPaths.markdownDescription:
Additional directories to search for `.csproj` files (for projects **outside** the workspace).

Example: `C:/repos/my-shared-libs`

nugetSwitcher.autoRestore.description: Automatically run dotnet restore after switching references.
nugetSwitcher.autoRestore.markdownDescription: Automatically run `dotnet restore` after switching references.

nugetSwitcher.excludePatterns.description: Glob patterns for directories to exclude from .csproj discovery.
nugetSwitcher.excludePatterns.markdownDescription: Glob patterns for directories to **exclude** from `.csproj` discovery.
